narrative: Hot US CPI and crude strength drive a sharp USD rally — DXY firms +0.40% as hawkish Fed expectations reset; USD/JPY at 157.70 remains supported by 300bp Fed-BoJ carry despite hawkish BoJ rhetoric. Equities retreat -0.88% while gold falls -1.04% near $4,679; VIX 18.7 signals building caution. AUD/JPY bilateral divergence (0.849% spread) persists as RBA 4.35% carry anchors AUD. Watch RBNZ rate decision May 27.
